person.name: Edd Norris
person.headline: Software innovator, creative technologist, and environmental systems builder
person.summary: I build useful systems that connect people, technology, and the living world.

practices.title: Environmental Systems & Technology
practices.summary: Software, data systems, operations, product strategy, and communication for agriculture, carbon, circular materials, and sustainability programs.

practices.title: Games, Interactive Media & Product Storytelling
practices.summary: Games, web experiences, platform concepts, identity systems, and marketing tools built to earn attention and create participation.

timeline.title: 2Bit Entertainment
timeline.summary: Game development, interactive products, creative direction, and the first durable body of public-facing work.

timeline.title: Software + marketing systems
timeline.summary: Built websites, product experiences, operational tools, and sales assets that helped organizations explain and sell what they do.

timeline.title: CO2T / biochar / carbon infrastructure
timeline.summary: Connected software, field operations, traceability, product development, and public communication around agriculture and carbon.

timeline.title: ERGO.games and advisory work
timeline.summary: Developing human-centered game platforms while packaging cross-disciplinary experience into consulting and employment-ready proof.

entries.title: 2Bit Entertainment
entries.summary: Games, interactive experiences, and product development.
actions: Founded and led a creative technology studio focused on games and interactive products.
Shipped web experiences, brand systems, and audience-centered design work.
outcomes: Built a durable public portfolio across entertainment and product storytelling.

entries.title: CO2T
entries.summary: Environmental products, carbon infrastructure, agriculture, software, and operations.
actions: Led software architecture, product strategy, and operational systems for carbon and agriculture programs.
Connected traceability, e-commerce, field operations, and public communication.
outcomes: Delivered integrated systems spanning biochar, agriculture, and carbon tracking.

entries.title: ERGO.games
entries.summary: A comfortable browser-based console for independent web games.
actions: Designed platform strategy and product architecture for a human-centered game hub.
Built Next.js experiences, entitlement models, and catalog systems.
outcomes: Created a scalable foundation for indie web games and interactive entertainment.

entries.title: Software Architecture
entries.summary: Full-stack systems, APIs, data models, and product infrastructure.

entries.title: Brand & Marketing
entries.summary: Identity systems, narrative, and go-to-market assets.

entries.title: Carbon Tracking
entries.summary: Traceability and reporting for carbon and biochar programs.

entries.title: Web Platforms
entries.summary: Product sites, dashboards, and operational tools.
